endings.title: Sunrise of Justice
endings.text:
The Warlord falls, the traitor is named, and the oracle walks free.

The city wins without becoming what it fought.

People tell the story the way stories should be told:
with scars, and pride, and fewer lies.

endings.title: Sunrise of Power
endings.text:
The city gains war-sight.

Battles become shorter.

Victories become cheaper.

But the council begins to speak in probabilities.

And people start to wonder what it costs to be safe.

endings.title: Sunrise in Ashes
endings.text:
You win the war outside the walls.

Inside the walls, rot continues.

Panic becomes habit.

The city survives—
but it never feels safe again.

Not really.

endings.title: Sunrise of the Blind War
endings.text:
You end war-sight.

Forever.

The enemy cannot predict.

Neither can you.

The next wars will be honest.

And honesty is expensive.

endings.title: Sunrise of Bloodsilk
endings.text:
You win.

But the ledger vanishes.

The traitor remains.

Someone in silk smiles behind a curtained window.

The city will need you again.

Sooner than you think.
